login.headline: Manage your customer portfolio and credit requests.
login.description: Access commercial information for customers under your responsibility in a simple, fast, and protected way — no password, just a link sent to your email.
login.instructions: Enter the email registered to your employee profile to receive a secure access link.
login.sentMessage: If the email is registered, we sent a link valid for 15 minutes. Also check spam and promotions.
login.footer: Protected environment powered by Lenext. Data is shown only to active registered employees.
login.linkSent: If the email is registered, we will send an access link.
